highlights.description: Initial PlexusOne design system with comprehensive design tokens and output profiles

added.description: Design system JSON specification with `$schema` reference
Foundation tokens: colors (dark theme palette), typography (Inter/JetBrains Mono), spacing scale, border radius
Component tokens: buttons (primary, secondary, ghost variants), inputs, cards with semantic styling
Semantic tokens: status colors (success, warning, error, info) and state colors (hover, focus, disabled)
Accent color palette: violet, cyan, pink, amber, emerald for branding flexibility
CSS variable generation config with customizable prefix, selector, and token mappings
